message:
Merge PR #2597: update go x/ packages (sys v0.42.0, time v0.15.0)

Minor version bumps for golang.org/x/sys and golang.org/x/time.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2597
Author: renovate[bot]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
